message.content: This section provides a quantitative data trend analysis of approximate monthly revenue (in 万元) for six game titles across a full calendar year (January–December). It enables retrieval of answers to questions regarding: **Topics & Metrics**: Month-by-month financial performance, revenue ranges, and fluctuation patterns. **Entities**: 心动小镇, 出发吧麦芬, 伊瑟, 火炬之光：无限, 香肠派对, and 仙境传说M. **Dates**: Specific monthly values from January through December (exact calendar year unspecified). **Claims & Comparisons**: Identification of peak and low-revenue months per title, stability trends, and cross-game revenue comparisons for any given month. **Evidence Type & Structure**: Structured quantitative financial data presented in a list format, optimized for direct tabular extraction or time-series querying. All figures are explicitly noted as approximate.
